ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the portfolio (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used for the portfolio (e.g., growth, value, balanced) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the portfolio manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the manager has in the financial industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk forecast */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated investment portfolio */,
  "return_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted return for the portfolio */,
  "rol_var_res" REAL /* Rolling variance of the portfolio returns */,
  "observe_return" REAL /* Observed return from recent data */,
  "rolling_var" REAL /* Calculated rolling variance over time */,
  "rol_avg" REAL /* Rolling average of returns */,
  "ewma" REAL /* Exponentially weighted moving average of returns */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the forecast (e.g., EWMA, GARCH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_forecasts_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated investment portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded return */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Return value on the specified date */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific asset within the portfolio */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the return data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_returns_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Market index name (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the market index on the specified date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated investment portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient representing the portfolio's volatility relative to the market */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio indicating risk-adjusted return */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio measuring return versus downside risk */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the risk metrics were calculated */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha coefficient representing the portfolio's performance relative to the benchmark */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
